source_pr.title: executor: testShowStatsSuite should not inherit testSuite
source_pr.body:
<!--
Thank you for contributing to TiDB! Please read TiDB's [CONTRIBUTING](https://github.com/pingcap/community/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md) document **BEFORE** filing this PR.
-->

### What problem does this PR solve? <!--add issue link with summary if exists-->

`testShowStatsSuite` should not inherit `testSuite`, otherwise `testShowStatsSuite` will run cases of `testSuite` redundantly.

### What is changed and how it works?

Make `testShowStatsSuite` not inheriting `testSuite`.


```
make failpoint-enable
cd executor
go test -race
cd -
make failpoint-disable
```


before:
```
OK: 409 passed, 6 skipped
PASS
ok  	github.com/pingcap/tidb/executor	133.007s
```

after:
```
OK: 367 passed, 6 skipped
PASS
ok  	github.com/pingcap/tidb/executor	79.329s
```

### Check List <!--REMOVE the items that are not applicable-->

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

 - Unit test

Code changes

 - None

Side effects

 - None

Related changes

 - None

Release note

 - None
